name: Astana (Kazakhstan)

colors.symbolism: the sky over the steppe and the heritage of the Turkic peoples — drawn from the Kazakh national flag

description: A light-blue field charged centrally with the coat of arms of Astana, featuring the Bayterek monument, an eagle, and a sun.
history: Astana has been the capital of Kazakhstan since 1997 (renamed from Akmola) and was briefly known as Nur-Sultan from 2019 to 2022. It is administered as a city of republican significance, separately from Akmola Region. The flag and coat of arms feature the Bayterek ("Tree of Life") monument that has become an icon of the new capital.

features.symbolism: the Bayterek monument, eagle, and sun emblematic of the capital
